name: 2.2 - Amadeus Sunsynk Sub-Agent
description: Deterministic Sunsynk power tool. Routes current and recent power questions to backend Supabase endpoints instead of Google Sheets.

parameters.content: Phase 10.3I: deterministic backend power read. Routes current questions to /current and recent/trend questions to /recent. No Google Sheets or LangChain agent loop in this workflow.
